project.description:
Batteries-included entry point for downstream studios (RFC 0040). The workspace stack (homing-workspace / -shell / -studio-workspace) is a strict downstream of homing-studio-base, so the "studio + workspace out of the box" wiring cannot live in studio-base itself (it would close a dependency cycle). This module sits ABOVE the whole stack and ties it together:
- StudioStarterFixtures — a Fixtures that IS DefaultFixtures plus the Studio Workspace pre-wired: GenericWorkspace served, StudioWorkspaceSpec registered, and GET /catalogue-tree rooted at the studio forest.
A downstream studio depends on THIS module only, constructs `new StudioStarterFixtures<>(umbrella)` instead of `new DefaultFixtures<>(umbrella)`, and the catalogue Navigator, tree feed, and leveled Open all light up with no per-studio wiring.
Doctrinal anchor: A Good Design Doesn't Pick Up Its Substrate — the starter is the one place the application-assembly defaults are composed; nothing below it knows the workspace exists.
